flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Metropolitan Community College Area fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Metropolitan Community College Area rose 36% between 2021 and 2024 (6.5k → 8.8k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Metropolitan Community College Area rose 15% between 2006 and 2009 (10.8% → 12.4%).
